Class Location


Framework : CATJDialog

Class Description

public interface interfaces CATKeyTreeModelCtxMenuEx
An interface to extend CATKeyTreeModel capabilities with contextual menu support.

Method Summary

public CATMenuModel getContextualMenu(String iKey) Get the contextual menu of a tree node.


Method Detail

getContextualMenu 

    public CATMenuModel getContextualMenu(String iKey)
Get the contextual menu of a tree node.
parameters:
iKey
The tree node key.
return:
The menu model representing the contextual menu to show.
